name: Solid Gold Nature's Harmony Chicken & Tuna Recipe in Gravy Grain-Free Wet Cat Food, 2.8-oz can, case of 12, 2 count
description: Keep your kitty’s tummy in purr-fect harmony with Solid Gold Nature's Harmony Chicken & Tuna Recipe in Gravy Grain-Free Wet Cat Food. This tasty entree is great for cats with sensitive stomachs. Each bite is packed with chicken broth, lean chicken shreds, tuna and a savory gravy that helps hydrate your favorite feline. The nutrient-rich recipe is low on calories without sacrificing the whisker-licking flavor cats love. Plus, it’s great for cats of all ages! Serve it alone or as a tasty topper with your cat’s favorite kibble.
